purpose: freeze the Hawking-to-HIDE boundary so HIDE can be refactored without the Hawking substrate moving underneath it
supersedes_scope_of: HAWKING_HIDE_RUNTIME_CONTRACT.json (which stays as the representation-class detail); this is the full frozen surface
status: FROZEN_AT_THE_BOUNDARY, implementation deferred until a parent admits a servable compact representation

gravity_loading_abi.header: hawking.gravity.shard_header.v1 JSON: model, architecture, tokenizer, compression, shard, integrity{body_sha256, tensor_count}, tensors[]
gravity_loading_abi.tensor_descriptor: name, codec, offset, bytes, sha256, shape, elements, plus codec-specific fields (generator, disposition, replaces for functional organs)
gravity_loading_abi.read_path: read_header (cheap, header only) -> open_shard -> read_tensor(verify_hash) -> iter_tensors

model_registry.admission_rule: a representation is registered production-servable only after its parent survives the contraction-first pilot and exact physical accounting
model_registry.current_registry: EMPTY by contract; GLM functional is FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY and must not be served

runtime_selection.selection_basis: lowest resident bytes and lowest measured latency; FRT_B wins on both

implies: a generator_id the runtime must implement or refuse
expanded runtime state billed separately from artifact bytes

load_unload_lifecycle.load: verify -> map/generate resident state (procedural grammar generates none at load; explicit generates the feature map) -> register
load_unload_lifecycle.unload: release resident state; the streamed pattern proven for DeepSeek loads one block, executes, releases, advances, so peak residency is one block not the whole model
load_unload_lifecycle.cold_vs_warm: cold = verify + full resident materialisation; warm = reuse resident state; both reported per representation

context_kv_lifecycle.boundary: the runtime owns KV/state; the functional MoE replacement is stateless per token and does not touch KV; attention/state organs own their own cache
context_kv_lifecycle.note: for a hybrid (functional MoE + served attention) the attention cache lifecycle is the served path's, unchanged

streaming_token_api.surface: prefill(tokens) -> state; step(state) -> (token, state); one token per step, one replayable graph per token
streaming_token_api.status: surface frozen; implementation waits on a complete servable model

tool_call_interruption_resume.surface: step is resumable from state; a tool-call interruption suspends after a completed token boundary and resumes from the returned state; no partial-token state is exposed

errors: resident state exceeds unified-memory policy (shortfall reported)

resource_modes.streamed_residency: one block at a time is a proven mode (DeepSeek streamed forward); whole-model residency is a mode only for models that fit
resource_modes.must_refuse: a declared resident state exceeding the policy, with the shortfall

research_vs_release_labels.RESEARCH_ONLY: may be loaded for measurement, must never present to a user as a validated model
research_vs_release_labels.RELEASE_CANDIDATE: passed the contraction-first pilot, physical accounting, and a complete-token proof
research_vs_release_labels.current: no Hawking model is a RELEASE_CANDIDATE; GLM functional is RESEARCH_ONLY, DeepSeek has no admitted representation

do_not_refactor_hide_until: a parent admits a servable compact representation; the contracts above are stable now so HIDE can build against them, but the FUNCTIONAL_MODEL loader is implemented only when a RELEASE_CANDIDATE exists
